title: Quick-seal splint
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A common medical device, even on remote worlds such as [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], the '''quick-seal splint''' was used to quickly and easily set broken limbs in the absence of a medical facility.

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] used one of these to set the broken leg of a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] he encountered in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] shortly before the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]].

{{Stub}}
